zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hulins於1595年7月15日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛時，她的父親John Hullings30歲，母親Margaret Lawrence38歲。她於1621年10月18日與Thomas Bliss在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特聖 尼拉希也 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1684年8月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年89歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Hulins于1595年7月15日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛时，她的父亲John Hullings30岁，母亲Margaret Lawrence38岁。她于1621年10月18日与Thomas Bliss在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特聖 尼拉希也 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1684年8月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年89岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hulins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Hugelin, Huelin, Hulin (ancient Germanic Huglin, a diminutive of Hugo); see Hugh . In some cases the surname may arise from the feminine form of this personal name.

variants.name: Hulan
meanings: Czech (also Hulán) and Slovak (also Húlan): occupational name from hulán ‘uhlan’ (a member of a cavalry regiment armed with a lance), a word ultimately derived from Turkish oğlan ‘servant, young man’.
Americanized form of an unidentified Vietnamese name.

variants.name: Hulin
meanings: Czech (Hulín) and Slovak (mainly Hulín): nickname from an altered form of the adjective holý ‘naked, bare, bald’ (see Holy ).
Swedish: ornamental name from an unidentified first element + the suffix -(l)in, derived from Latin -(l)inius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Hulings
meanings: English (Shropshire): variant of Huling , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave seen in memorial list.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hulins was born on 15 July 1595, in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hullings, was 30 and her mother, Margaret Lawrence, was 38. She married Thomas Bliss on 18 October 1621, in St Nicholas' Church, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 28 August 1684, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 89, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Hulins est née le 15 juillet 1595, à Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hullings, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lawrence, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bliss le 18 octobre 1621, à St Nicholas' Church, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1684, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Hulins am 15. Juli 1595 in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hullings 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret Lawrence 38. Sie hat am 18. Oktober 1621 in St Nicholas' Church, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England Thomas Bliss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. August 1684 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hulins è nata il il 15 luglio 1595 nel Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Hullings, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret Lawrence, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bliss il 18 ottobre 1621, nel St Nicholas' Church, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1684, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Hulinsが1595年7月15日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロドボロウで生まれた時，父John Hullingsは30歳，母Margaret Lawrenceは38歳であった。1621年10月18日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスタースト ニチオラス' チャーチでThomas Blissと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1684年8月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで89歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hulins(이)가 1595년 7월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 로드버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hullings(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Lawrence(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1621년 10월 18일 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터 스트 닉홀아스' 처르치에서 Thomas Bliss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1684년 8월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스플링필드 스플링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hulins nasceu em 15 de julho de 1595, em Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hullings, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lawrence, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bliss em 18 de outubro de 1621, em St Nicholas' Church, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1684, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hulins родилась 15 июля 1595 г. в местности родбороую, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hullings было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lawrence, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bliss 18 октября 1621 г. в местности ст ничолас' чурч, глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 28 августа 1684 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Hulins nació el 15 de julio de 1595, en Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hullings, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Lawrence, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Bliss el 18 de octubre de 1621, en St Nicholas' Church, Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1684, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
